differential_diagnoses: Meconium aspiration syndrome with secondary complications
next_steps: Computed tomography (CT) of the chest with contrast to characterize the persistent opacity and vascular supply
Renal ultrasound and voiding cystourethrogram to evaluate the urinary tract dilatation
Tracheal aspirate for broad-spectrum cultures including fungal and atypical bacterial pathogens
Pediatric surgery consultation for possible lung resection or diagnostic biopsy
Pediatric urology consultation for the management of the urinary tract anomaly
Bronchoscopy to rule out airway compression or structural anomalies
